title: Worktree
description: A worktree is an isolated checkout or workspace the factory uses so agent lanes can run without colliding on the same tree.

whatItIs.title: What It Is
whatItIs.body: A worktree is an isolated checkout or workspace the factory uses for a work item or lane—for example under .claude/worktrees/<name>/. It is a separate tree of files so that lane can edit and verify without sharing the same working tree as other lanes. A worktree is not the factory workflow system itself, and it is not just a branch name.
